settings.cta_subtitle: When clean, naturally-derived ingredients meet clinical potency, the results do not disappoint

settings.text: Not satisfied? Contact us and we'll make it right.

settings.title: Pumpkin Seed Oil
settings.text: Clinical-grade oil rich in rare Delta-7-Sterols reduces inflammation while flooding your system with Nitric Oxide to relax the "vice grip" of smooth muscle tension in your pelvic region.

settings.title: Saw Palmetto
settings.text: Our standardized extract blocks both Type 1 and Type 2 5-alpha-reductase enzymes to stop the DHT fuel source that causes prostate enlargement and disrupts your sleep.

settings.title: Cold-Pressed Softgels
settings.text: Cold-pressed extraction preserves delicate bioactive compounds that heat processing destroys, ensuring maximum potency and superior absorption compared to powders or capsules.

settings.question: Can I take this when I'm already on medication?
settings.answer: Always consult your healthcare provider before adding this supplement to your regimen if you are currently being treated for a medical condition.

settings.question: Does this product contain common allergens?
settings.answer: Our product is free from gluten, dairy, soy and artificial preservatives.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 2-3 business days for processing, followed by a 7-14 business day transit time. Please note your location as well as customs heavily influence shipment time.

settings.question: How does your money-back guarantee work?
settings.answer: If you're not satisfied with your results, contact us and we'll make it right.

settings.heading: Questions? We're here to help.
settings.subtitle: You can also chat with us on the bottom right!
